mapper.select: SELECT id, k3_id, supplier_code, contact_name, gender, position, phone, mobile, email, qq, location_name, address, remark, type, vx, customer_number, creator, creation_date FROM supplier_contact WHERE customer_number = #{contractBse}

SELECT id, k3_id, supplier_code, contact_name, gender, position, phone, mobile, email, qq, location_name, address, remark, type, vx, customer_number, creator, creation_date FROM supplier_contact WHERE customer_number = #{customerNumber}

SELECT id, k3_id, supplier_code, contact_name, gender, position, phone, mobile, email, qq, location_name, address, remark, type, vx, customer_number, creator, creation_date FROM supplier_contact WHERE supplier_code = #{supplierCode} AND contact_name = #{contactName}

SELECT id, k3_id, supplier_code, contact_name, gender, position, phone, mobile, email, qq, location_name, address, remark, type, vx, customer_number, creator, creation_date FROM supplier_contact WHERE customer_number = #{customerNumber} AND contact_name = #{contactName}

SELECT id, k3_id AS k3id, supplier_code AS supplierCode, contact_name AS contactName, gender, position, phone, qq, mobile, email, location_name, address, remark, type, vx, customer_number AS customerNumber, creator, creation_date AS creationDate FROM supplier_contact WHERE supplier_code IN
#{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_contact (k3_id, supplier_code, contact_name, gender, position, phone, qq, mobile, email, location_name, address,defaultContact, remark, type, vx, customer_number, creator, creation_date) VALUES (#{k3id}, #{supplierCode}, #{contactName}, #{gender}, #{position}, #{phone}, #{qq}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{locationName}, #{address},#{defaultContact}, #{remark}, #{type}, #{vx}, #{customerNumber}, #{creator}, #{creationDate})
mapper.update:
UPDATE supplier_contact
contact_name = #{contactName},
location_name = #{locationName},
position = #{position},
phone = #{phone},
defaultContact = #{defaultContact},
mobile = #{mobile},
email = #{email},
qq = #{qq},
address = #{address},
gender = #{gender},
k3_id = #{k3id},
supplier_code = #{supplierCode},
remark = #{remark},
type = #{type},
vx = #{vx},
customer_number = #{customerNumber},
creator = #{creator},
creation_date = #{creationDate},
WHERE k3_id = #{k3id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, k3_id AS k3id, supplier_code AS supplierCode, contact_name AS contactName, gender, position, phone, qq, mobile, email, location_name, address, remark, type, vx, customer_number AS customerNumber, creator, creation_date AS creationDate FROM supplier_contact WHERE id = #{id}
